spec_match.rationale: The simulation still models the three-actor push synchronization flow and contrasts the pre-138 stale-endpoint bug with the post-138 resubscription event path.

interactive.rationale: Subscribe, rotate, send, reset, and pre/post-138 mode controls all update endpoint state, backend state, and the delivery log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page delivers the feature-index promise of making silent endpoint rotation and backend resynchronization visible.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes browser capability checks for Service Workers, PushManager, pushsubscriptionchange event exposure, and Notification permission support.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes the ChromeStatus entry, sibling event timeline demo, and the Push API pushsubscriptionchange spec link.

design_system.rationale: Fresh and stale endpoint boxes now use readable text-black foreground on bg-paper with accent borders instead of matching foreground/background colors.

summary: Resolved the server-sync-flow critique by fixing invisible endpoint status text, adding a live browser capability probe, preserving the interactive pre/post-138 synchronization flow, and adding the direct Push API event reference.
